mini/ preview local-only validation

本地源码/构建验证：当前 mini/ 证据仅证明 Mini auth/session 边界与本地构建产物存在，不代表真实微信模拟器、真机或运行时验证。

Evidence source: mini/ local source-build validation output.

Generated from the committed mini/ source tree. This is not evidence of real WeChat simulator, device, or runtime success.

JWT 登录 + Bearer digest cards

Mini home/watch digest surface

此页面聚焦既有 `/api/auth/login` 与受保护 `/api/watch/digests` 契约的本地源码/构建验证，强调一股一张卡、等待态保留，以及仅消费共享紧凑字段的移动端映射。

authStateauthenticated
raw payload cards3
visible cards2
placeholder cards1
POST /api/auth/login contract
persisted bearer session
protected digest read path
one card per stock_code
placeholder cards preserved
compact shared fields only
local-only disclosure
one-card-per-stock_code deduped 1

Authenticated preview payload contained 3 digest rows and rendered 2 visible cards for canonical stock_code values: 600519, 000001.

Placeholder/waiting-state cards remain visible after dedupe, so pending watched stocks are not dropped from the Mini home surface.

compact shared fields presentation-neutral

The Mini mapping consumes only compact digest-card fields and does not require report bodies, browser routes, or runtime-specific context.

stock_codestock_namemarketboardexchangecurrent_pricechange_percentdigest_statussummaryrisk_levelrule_statustask_statustask_idupdated_attask_updated_at
auth-required missing_or_invalid_session

需要重新登录后才能查看受保护盯盘内容

当前未检测到可用 Bearer 会话，页面已阻止显示任何受保护盯盘卡片。

body.username: Field required
